ActivityWikiEnabled.description: Master switch — enable or disable all ActivityWiki federation.

ActivityWikiActorName.description: Display name for the wiki actor on the Fediverse. Defaults to $wgSitename if empty.

ActivityWikiActorUsername.description: The handle for the wiki actor (the part before @domain). Defaults to a slugified $wgSitename if empty.

ActivityWikiActorSummary.description: Short bio shown on Mastodon and other Fediverse clients.

ActivityWikiActorIcon.description: Absolute URL to the wiki logo used as the actor avatar. Defaults to $wgFavicon if empty.

ActivityWikiKeySize.description: RSA key size in bits for HTTP Signature key pair generation. Minimum 2048, recommended 4096.

ActivityWikiPublishCreations.description: Federate page creation events as ActivityPub Create activities.

ActivityWikiPublishEdits.description: Federate page edit events as ActivityPub Update activities.

ActivityWikiPublishDeletions.description: Federate page deletion events as ActivityPub Delete activities.

ActivityWikiPublishMoves.description: Federate page move/rename events as ActivityPub Update activities.

ActivityWikiPublishMinorEdits.description: Include minor edits in federation. False suppresses them to reduce follower noise.

ActivityWikiPublishNamespaces.description: Array of namespace IDs to federate. Default is main namespace only (0).

ActivityWikiExcerptLength.description: Maximum plain-text excerpt length in characters included in activity content.

ActivityWikiDeliveryRetries.description: Number of retry attempts for failed HTTP deliveries to follower inboxes.

ActivityWikiEnableUserActors.description: Enable per-user ActivityPub actors. Post-MVP feature — do not enable in production.

ActivityWikiDebugLevel.description: Debug verbosity: 0 = off, 1 = verbose logging to the ActivityWiki log channel.
